Dashboard.title: Dashboard
Dashboard.description: Welcome to the dashboard! Here you can manage your team, view profiles, and access all of RecruitHub's features.

role.label: Role
role.tooltip: Role of the member in the team

confirm.title: Confirm Action
confirm.description: Are you sure you want to perform this action? This action cannot be undone.

SignUp.title: Sign up
SignUp.description: Create a RecruitHub account to start managing your teams and candidates.
SignUp.sign-up-success: Sign up successful! Please check your email to verify your account.

SignIn.title: Log in
SignIn.description: Welcome back! Please log in to your RecruitHub account.

Teams.join-team-success: Join request submitted. Please wait for the team owner's approval.

JoinTeam.title: Join team
JoinTeam.description: Enter the invite code to join your team.

CreateTeam.title: Create team
CreateTeam.description: Create a new team to start managing candidates and collaborating with teammates.

user.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.
user.already-in-team: User is already in a team.

team.user-already-in-team: User is already in the team.
team.not-in-team: User is not in the team.
team.same-team: You are already using this team.

validation.password-format: Password must be 8-72 characters and include uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and special characters.
validation.username-format: Username can only contain letters, numbers, and underscores.
validation.invalid-slug: Slug can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.
validation.invalid-emails: One or more email addresses are invalid.

emails.label: Email list
emails.placeholder: Enter emails, separated by commas or new lines

Invite.title: Invite new members
Invite.sidebar-description: Add teammates to collaborate, share ideas, and get things done together.
Invite.form-description: Invite your team members to collaborate
Invite.email-helper: You can paste multiple email addresses, separated by new lines
Invite.role-helper-member: Members can view and collaborate on projects.
Invite.role-helper-admin: Admins can manage members, settings, and invites.
Invite.invalid-emails: Invalid email format in the list
